title: Apply / Revert a Schedule
content:
# Apply / Revert a Schedule

To immediately apply the scheduled changes and ignore the scheduled time, click on the **Applications** menu item in the left hand sidebar, select the targeted Kelvin SmartApp™ then click on the **Scheduless** tab.

Find the wanted schedule and click on the **Apply Now** button.
summary: To immediately apply the scheduled changes and ignore the scheduled time, click on the Applications menu item in the left hand sidebar, select the targeted Kelvin SmartApp™ then click on the Scheduless tab.
